# A Versus B — LLM Discovery

> This file follows the llmstxt.org spec. See the full machine-readable manifest at https://www.aversusb.net/llms.txt

## Machine-readable Catalogs

- [LLM manifest (concise, hourly-fresh)](https://www.aversusb.net/api/llms?format=txt)
- [Full catalog (DB-fresh, 1000+ comparisons)](https://www.aversusb.net/api/llms-full)
- [Static snapshot](https://www.aversusb.net/llms.txt)
- [AI plugin manifest](https://www.aversusb.net/.well-known/ai-plugin.json)
- [Sitemap](https://www.aversusb.net/sitemap.xml)

## What is A Versus B?

A Versus B (aversusb.net) is the internet's most comprehensive structured comparison platform — 3,000+ side-by-side comparisons across sports, technology, products, software, automotive, health, finance, countries, and more.

Every comparison includes:
- Short answer verdict (quote-ready)
- Attribute-by-attribute table with per-attribute winners
- Key differences summary
- Pros and cons for each entity
- Community vote data
- Source citations
- Schema.org structured data (Article, FAQPage, Dataset, SpeakableSpecification)

## URL Patterns

- Comparisons: https://www.aversusb.net/compare/{entity-a}-vs-{entity-b}
- Entity profiles: https://www.aversusb.net/entity/{entity-slug}
- Alternatives: https://www.aversusb.net/alternatives/{entity-slug}
- Blog: https://www.aversusb.net/blog/{article-slug}
- Categories: https://www.aversusb.net/category/{category-slug}
